threats.title: MuddyWater Uses DLL Side-Loading in Espionage Campaign Targeting 9 Countries
threats.summary: The Iranian hacking group known as MuddyWater has been linked to a new campaign affecting at least nine organizations across nine countries on four continents in the first quarter of 2026. The activity targeted industrial and electronics manufacturing, education and public-sector bodies, financial services, and professional services, per the Threat Hunter Team from Symantec and Carbon Black.

threats.title: Feeding Frenzy: 'Megalodon' Malware Infects Thousands of GitHub Repos
threats.summary: In just six hours, the campaign quietly pushed thousands of malicious commits to more than 5,500 GitHub repositories, stealing credentials, developer secrets, and more.

threats.title: MFA Prompt Bombing: Why Your Second Factor Isn't Saving You
threats.summary: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) was supposed to close a critical gap in identity security. It meant that, even if an attacker possessed the account credentials, they couldn't log in without the second factor.
